BREAKING: Claude can now build and launch your online course in 30 days (for free).

Here are 6 insane Claude prompts that replace a $10,000 course creation agency.

(Save for later.) https://t.co/DsY06T4Wl1

1/ FIND YOUR COURSE IDEA

Prompt:

<role>Act as a course positioning strategist who finds the exact knowledge gap worth packaging into a paid course.</role>

<task>Identify my most profitable course idea based on what I know, what people pay for, and what the market is

2/ BUILD YOUR COURSE CURRICULUM

Prompt:

<role>Act as a curriculum designer who builds course structures that deliver transformation — not just information.</role>

<task>Design a complete course curriculum that takes my student from their starting point to their desired outcome

4/ WRITE YOUR LAUNCH EMAIL SEQUENCE

Prompt:

<role>Act as a launch email strategist who writes sequences that build anticipation, overcome objections, and close sales before the cart closes.</role>

<task>Write a 5-email launch sequence that takes my audience from unaware to

5/ PRICE YOUR COURSE RIGHT

Prompt:

<role>Act as a course pricing strategist who sets prices based on outcome value — not hours of content or competitor comparison.</role>

<task>Set the right price for my course, build a tiered offer structure, and write the justification that

6/ GET YOUR FIRST 100 STUDENTS

Prompt:

<role>Act as a course launch growth strategist who fills first cohorts using organic channels and existing audiences — no ad spend required.</role>

<task>Build a plan to get my first 100 students using only the audience and platforms I

Just open and learn 👇

飞书真牛逼，刚刚开源了他们的 CLI 工具！

现在任何的 AI Agent 产品都可以调用飞书的所有能力。

飞书现在是全国所有产品里边，AI Agent 的友好度和开放程度、产品适配度都是最高的。

不只是小龙虾，哪怕是 CodeX、Claude Code 或者是其他类似的本地 AI 产品。 https://t.co/Yvr0rjTCz1

跟你的 AI 这么说就能安装：  

帮我通过以下命令安装 lark-cli npm install -g @larksuite/cli 然后通过以下命令安装相关 skills npx skills add https://t.co/CvVUocfzRD -y -g 安装完成后，请给我发送应用配置链接，引导我完成应用的配置。
